ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry sector the company belongs to */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "EPS" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "PE_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Open interest (number of outstanding derivative contracts) */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for corporate actions */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio if a stock split occurred */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, compliance officer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for notifications */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date and time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the watchlist */,
  "watchlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the watchlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the watchlist was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the watchlist was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "watchlist_stocks" (
  "watchlist_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist stock relationship */,
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the watchlist */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was added to the watchlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the stock in the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_watchlist_stocks_watchlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("watchlist_id") REFERENCES watchlists ("watchlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold, volume threshold) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* The value that triggers the alert */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table the action was performed on */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (insert, update, delete) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
